huggingface_papers.authors: Xiangru Jian, Hao Xu, Wei Pang

huggingface_papers.authors: Dewei Zhou, You Li, Zongxin Yang

huggingface_papers.authors: Hadas Orgad, Boyi Wei, Kaden Zheng

huggingface_papers.authors: Chanhyuk Choi, Taesoo Kim, Donggyu Lee

huggingface_papers.title: Initialisation Determines the Basin: Efficient Codebook Optimisation for Extreme LLM Quantization
huggingface_papers.summary: Additive quantization enables extreme LLM compression with O(1) lookup-table dequantization, making it attractive for edge deployment. Yet at 2-bit precision, it often fails catastrophically, even with extensive search and finetuning. We show that the dominant bottleneck is codebook initialisation.
huggingface_papers.authors: Ian W. Kennedy, Nafise Sadat Moosavi
